headline: Bride Uninvites Sister Over 'Emotional Support Water Bottle' Drama, Wedding Is Now In Shambles
summary: The water bottle in question was 'making eye contact during the toast.'
fullBody: Bridezilla McPlanner has uninvited her sister after a heated argument about an 'emotional support water bottle.' 'She brought it to the rehearsal dinner and it was staring at me,' the bride claimed. The sister insists it's 'just a hydro flask.' The wedding party has split into #TeamSister and #TeamHydroFlask. The groom is 'staying out of it' and has been sleeping at a Holiday Inn. The cake has not been ordered.
